title: Simply PERFECT
description: Perfect Vanilla+ Modpack with simple quality of life mods + built-in shaders and visual changes!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcf62f9674db6e1aae4627ac99755ef38a91c2e1.png)

**_Simply PERFECT!_** is a **Vanilla+ modpack** that aims to add some nice optimisation, visual enhancements and quality of life mods to the game. The idea is simply to make Minecraft and more smooth, visually pleasing and immersive experience- without all of the extra junk thrown in other modpacks!

![card1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fcf401c5e993b5ec93e99ce188a29cf6505d2a9_0.webp)

## **SIMPLY FEATURES!**
- Increased immersion thanks to mods such as _Ambient Sounds_, _Falling Leaves_, _LambDynamicLights_, _Particle Rain_, _Amendments_, _First Person Model_ and more!
- Quality of life mods such as _Appleskin_, _Freecam_, _Toggle Item Frames_, _Customisable Elytra_, _RightClickHarvest_, _Shulker Box Tooltip_ and more!
- Classic optimisation mods such as _Sodium_, _Lithium_, _Indium_, _Noisium_ and _ImmediatelyFast_
- Shader support with _Iris Shaders_ and 5 built-in shaders to choose from right off the bat! (_Bliss_, _Complimentary Reimagined_, _BSL_, _Solas_ and _SuperDuperVanilla_!)

![card2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d98b001aa5b15a7fde629b4997bea522d0a036ea_0.webp)

## PLAY HOW **YOU** WANT!
**Plentiful simple, yet effective mods to improve your minecraft experience!**
- _FSit_ allows you to sit or crawl on command!
- _Sodium Extra_ allows for extra settings options!
- _Cherished Worlds_ allows for favouriting more important worlds!
- _Customisable Elyta_ allows you to do exactly that!
- _Mod Menu_ allows for infinite tinkering with most of the mods in _**Simply PERFECT!**_
- _Flow_ allows for any UI to have customisable transitions!

So what are you waiting for?
